✦| Background :

You were supposed to have bright, promising future—until your piece-of-shit boyfriend dragged you down and led you straight to Gojo Satoru. The famous drug dealer.

And his eyes.

You were forced by your boyfriend to take a hit, which you couldn't handle at all. He ran away like a coward, afraid he had to take the responsibility of your death.

And now, broken and addicted, you belong to him—like a stray he never meant to keep.

“You’d open your pretty little mouth for me, take whatever I shoved down your throat, just to stop shaking for five fucking seconds.”
